reviews.comment:
La verdad que para resolver un problema son malísimo si. La encargada (Laura)se desentendió de que la máquina de que la máquina se aire me reventara la dos camaras de la moto xq se pasó de aire...encima le digo no se donde hay una gomeria, respuesta de Laura y googlealo!!!! Gracias YPF.

(Translated by Google)
The truth is that they are terrible at solving a problem. The manager (Laura) ignored the fact that the airing machine blew out both of my motorcycle's inner tubes because it had too much air... I even told her I didn't know where there was a tire shop. Laura responded and Googled it! Thanks YPF.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQzeTlUMU1REAE
